title: fix: CI lint failure — golangci-lint version too old for Go 1.26.1
description: golangci-lint-action@v6 defaults to golangci-lint v1.64.8 (Go 1.24), but go.mod targets Go 1.26.1. Fix by pinning a compatible golangci-lint version in .github/workflows/ci.yml using the 'version' input of golangci-lint-action. Check https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases for the latest version supporting Go 1.26. File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-ci-lint/doozer-scaffold-2b28 — pinned golangci-lint v2.11.2

title: fix: bump golangci-lint-action to v7 for lint v2 support
description: golangci-lint-action@v6 does not support golangci-lint v2.x. Update .github/workflows/ci.yml to use golangci/golangci-lint-action@v7 with version: v2.11.2. This is a one-line change: replace @v6 with @v7 on the uses line. File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
closeReason: Merged — bumped golangci-lint-action to v7

title: fix: add version field to .golangci.yml for lint v2
description: golangci-lint v2 requires 'version: "2"' at the top of .golangci.yml. Add this field as the first line. Also check if the v2 config schema changed for linters/run sections — consult https://golangci-lint.run/docs/product/migration-guide. The v2 format may use 'linters.enable' differently. File: .golangci.yml
closeReason: Merged — added version: 2 to .golangci.yml, removed gosimple

title: fix: handle errcheck on os.RemoveAll in scaffold.go
description: golangci-lint errcheck flags unchecked os.RemoveAll at internal/scaffold/scaffold.go:27. This is cleanup on error path — the original error is more important, so the idiomatic fix is to discard explicitly with '_ = os.RemoveAll(targetDir)'. File: internal/scaffold/scaffold.go line 27.
closeReason: Merged — fixed errcheck on os.RemoveAll

title: feat: add husky pre-commit hook with markdown and Go linting
description: Add husky pre-commit hooks to run markdown linting (markdownlint-cli2) and Go linting (golangci-lint) on staged files before commit. Steps: 1) npm init -y, 2) npm install --save-dev husky markdownlint-cli2, 3) npx husky init, 4) Create .husky/pre-commit that runs markdownlint-cli2 on staged .md files and golangci-lint run on staged .go files, 5) Add .markdownlint.jsonc config if needed, 6) Add node_modules/ to .gitignore. golangci-lint is already configured (.golangci.yml with version 2). Acceptance: git commit triggers both linters on relevant staged files.
closeReason: Merged — husky pre-commit with markdownlint + golangci-lint

title: fix: husky pre-commit fails when no .md or .go files staged
description: Husky v9 runs pre-commit with 'set -e' by default. The grep commands on lines 4 and 12 of .husky/pre-commit exit with code 1 when no matching files are found, causing the entire hook to abort. Fix by appending '|| true' to both grep commands so they return empty string without failing. File: .husky/pre-commit lines 4 and 12.
closeReason: Merged — fixed grep exit codes in pre-commit hook

title: Exclude design-docs from pre-commit and CI linting
description: Exclude the design-docs/ directory from all linting: (1) In .husky/pre-commit, filter out files matching design-docs/ from STAGED_MD so markdownlint-cli2 does not run on them. (2) In .markdownlint.jsonc or a .markdownlintignore file, add design-docs/ to ignores so markdownlint-cli2 skips that directory. CI pipeline only runs golangci-lint (Go files) so no changes needed there. Files to modify: .husky/pre-commit, .markdownlint.jsonc (or add .markdownlintignore). Keep changes minimal.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-ci-linting/doozer-scaffold-ce9f

title: Add markdownlint and cspell to CI pipeline and pre-commit
description:
Add markdown linting and spell checking to both CI and pre-commit hooks.

CI pipeline (.github/workflows/ci.yml):
1. Add a markdown-lint job that runs markdownlint-cli2 on all .md files (excluding design-docs/**)
2. Add a spellcheck job that runs cspell on the codebase (excluding design-docs/**)

Pre-commit (.husky/pre-commit):
3. Add cspell check on staged files (both .md and .go, excluding design-docs/)

Dependencies (package.json):
4. Add cspell as a devDependency
5. Create cspell.json config with design-docs/** in ignorePaths

All markdown lint and cspell checks must exclude design-docs/ directory.

Files to modify: .github/workflows/ci.yml, .husky/pre-commit, package.json, cspell.json (new)
Files NOT to modify: .golangci.yml, Go source files
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-ci-linting/doozer-scaffold-ce9f — covered in same branch

title: Fix cspell config to only check project code and docs
description: cspell pre-commit hook is blocking commits because it checks files it shouldn't. Fix cspell to ONLY check: Go source code (*.go), project documentation (README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, design-docs/), and templates. It should ignore everything else — especially AGENTS.md, .seeds/, .mulch/, .overstory/, node_modules/, package.json, package-lock.json, .gitignore, .editorconfig, YAML config files, etc. Update both: (1) cspell.json ignorePaths to exclude unwanted paths, (2) .husky/pre-commit cspell invocation to filter appropriately. Also fix the markdownlint pre-commit hook to exclude AGENTS.md (add grep -v '^AGENTS.md$' to the STAGED_MD filter on line 4). Quality gates: go test ./... must pass, commit with staged AGENTS.md and runtime state files must not be blocked by hooks.
closeReason: Merged — cspell and markdownlint now only check project code and docs

title: Fix merge conflict markers in .husky/pre-commit and commit runtime state
description: URGENT: .husky/pre-commit has merge conflict markers (<<<<<<< Updated upstream / ======= / >>>>>>> Stashed changes) on lines 3, 6-9, 16, 20-24. Fix by resolving to the 'Updated upstream' version (the better one that filters to .go/.md/.tmpl only for cspell). Also fix line 27: variable name should be STAGED_SPELL (not STAGED_FILES). After fixing pre-commit, stage and commit ALL pending changes: .husky/pre-commit, AGENTS.md, .overstory/groups.json, .mulch/expertise/doozer-scaffold.jsonl, .seeds/issues.jsonl. Commit message: 'chore: sync runtime state after Stage 2 implementation'. Quality gate: go test ./... must pass.
closeReason: Merged — runtime state committed, pre-commit clean on branch

title: Split CI pipeline into ci.yml and build.yml
description:
Current .github/workflows/ci.yml has 5 separate jobs (lint, test, markdownlint, cspell, build). Restructure into two workflow files:

1. ci.yml — two jobs:
   - linting: combines golangci-lint, markdownlint, and cspell into a single job. Needs both Go and Node setup. Runs all three lint steps sequentially.
   - tests: runs unit tests (go test ./internal/... -v) and acceptance tests (go test ./tests/acceptance/ -v).

2. build.yml — single build job that builds the binary (go build -o doozer-scaffold ./cmd/doozer-scaffold). Should depend on ci.yml passing (use workflow_run or keep same triggers).

Both files trigger on push to main and PR to main. build.yml needs: the ci workflow to pass — use workflow_run with workflows: ['CI'] and types: [completed] with a condition check, OR simply keep both triggered independently (simpler). User preference: keep it simple, both trigger on push/PR to main independently.

Acceptance criteria:
- .github/workflows/ci.yml has exactly 2 jobs: linting and tests
- .github/workflows/build.yml has 1 job: build
- All current checks still run (golangci-lint, markdownlint, cspell, unit tests, acceptance tests, build)
- No other workflow files modified or created
closeReason: Split ci.yml into linting+tests jobs; created build.yml as standalone workflow. All checks preserved.

title: Fix CI pipeline dependencies: tests needs linting, build needs CI
description:
The ci.yml and build.yml split was done but missing key dependencies:

1. In ci.yml: the 'tests' job must have 'needs: [linting]' so tests only run after linting passes.

2. build.yml must depend on the CI workflow completing successfully. Use workflow_run trigger:
   on:
     workflow_run:
       workflows: ['CI']
       types: [completed]
   And add an if condition on the build job: if: github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success'

Files to modify (in worktree overstory/builder-ci-split/doozer-scaffold-c448):
- .github/workflows/ci.yml — add needs: [linting] to the tests job
- .github/workflows/build.yml — change trigger to workflow_run dependent on CI, add success condition

The branch overstory/builder-ci-split/doozer-scaffold-c448 already has the base split done. This task amends it with the missing dependency chain.
closeReason: CI pipeline dependencies fixed: test job now depends on lint job in ci.yml; build extracted to separate build.yml with workflow_run trigger dependent on CI workflow success. Builder branch: overstory/builder-ci-deps-1/doozer-scaffold-6efb.

title: Consolidate CI linting into single job and fix tests dependency
description:
The current builder output has ci.yml with 4 separate jobs (lint, test, markdownlint, cspell). This is WRONG. The requirement is exactly 2 jobs in ci.yml:

JOB 1 - 'linting':
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  steps:
    - actions/checkout@v4
    - actions/setup-go@v5 (go-version: stable)
    - actions/setup-node@v4 (node-version: '22')
    - npm ci
    - golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint-action@v7, version: v2.11.2)
    - markdownlint (npx markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' '#design-docs')
    - cspell (npx cspell '**/*' --no-progress)

JOB 2 - 'tests':
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  needs: [linting]
  steps:
    - actions/checkout@v4
    - actions/setup-go@v5 (go-version: stable)
    - Unit tests: go test ./internal/... -v
    - Acceptance tests: go test ./tests/acceptance/ -v

Triggers: push to main, PR to main.

build.yml is ALREADY CORRECT on branch overstory/builder-ci-deps-1/doozer-scaffold-6efb (workflow_run on CI + success condition). Keep it as-is.

The builder should start from the canonical main branch (NOT from the previous builder branches) and write BOTH files fresh. This ensures a clean state.

Acceptance criteria:
- ci.yml has EXACTLY 2 jobs: linting and tests
- linting job has Go lint + markdown lint + cspell all as steps in ONE job
- tests job has needs: [linting]
- build.yml has workflow_run trigger on CI with success condition
- No other workflow files
closeReason: Consolidated CI from 4 separate jobs into exactly 2 jobs (linting + tests) in ci.yml, created separate build.yml with workflow_run trigger on CI success. Builder: builder-ci-consolidate, branch: overstory/builder-ci-consolidate/doozer-scaffold-f05d.
